title: Testkit Provider Compliance
subtitle: Provider × compliance test — every implementer of a provider interface runs the same suite
purpose: The contract claim: any provider in any package must pass arcana-testkit's runComplianceSuite. v0.1.0 ships with one provider (libsql) and one placeholder test, just to prove the harness wires up.

providers.v0_1_target: Full StructuredStore over libsql — all 9 entity types, in-memory integration tests

tests.label: storeMemory then getMemory returns the same Memory
All 9 entity types covered with in-memory SQLite integration tests

providers.v0_1_target: Not in v0.1 — planned future provider
providers.note: Unblocks KyberAgent Desktop and ChromaDB removal from KyberBot. Compliance harness will run against this once it ships.

tests.label: upsert one chunk, query returns it

providers.v0_1_target: Not in v0.1 — placeholder row to show the suite scales. Kybernesis Brain must shed 5 Convex artifacts before this is viable.

tests.label: storeMemory then getMemory returns the same Memory
